properties.description: UI-only 'Reset panel when changing effects' checkbox, NOT serialized. Persisted to wxConfig under xLightsResetBlendingPanel by the subclass. Controls whether SetDefaultControls clears user values when the selected effect changes.

properties.label: Suppress Effect Until Frame
properties.description: Frame number before which the effect renders as black / invisible. Used to hold the layer off until a specific frame inside the effect's timespan.

properties.label: Freeze Effect At Frame
properties.description: Frame number at which the effect stops advancing. The last-rendered frame is held for the remainder of the effect's timespan. Default 999999 means 'never freeze'.

Custom compound row: Morph checkbox + Effect Layer Mix slider + lock button, matching the legacy layout. The Morph checkbox is backed by E_CHECKBOX_LayerMorph and the slider by E_SLIDER_EffectLayerMix (both legacy names preserved).
Custom row: Layer Method choice + '?' help button. Serialized as T_CHOICE_LayerMethod.

Custom row: Canvas checkbox + 'Layers ...' button. When Canvas is enabled and a layer range is available the button becomes usable and opens the LayerSelectDialog; the selected layer list is persisted as T_LayersSelected by the subclass.

Compound header row built by the subclass: [In_Transition_Type choice] + 'Time (s)' label + [Fadein BulkEditComboBox]. Matches the legacy single-line layout and keeps In_Transition_Type / Fadein addressable via the window walk under their legacy ID_CHOICE_In_Transition_Type / ID_TEXTCTRL_Fadein names. Suppress-if-default for these two controls is handled explicitly in BlendingPanel::GetBlendingString.

properties.label: Adjustment
properties.description: Generic tuning parameter passed to the selected in-transition (0-100). Meaning depends on the transition.

properties.label: Reverse
properties.description: Reverses the direction / polarity of the in-transition. Ignored by transitions that are inherently non-directional.
Compound header row built by the subclass: [Out_Transition_Type choice] + 'Time (s)' label + [Fadeout BulkEditComboBox]. Same single-line pattern as In_Transition_Header.

properties.label: Adjustment
properties.description: Generic tuning parameter passed to the selected out-transition (0-100).

properties.label: Reverse
properties.description: Reverses the direction / polarity of the out-transition.

notes: A UI-only 'Reset panel when changing effects' checkbox exists in the legacy panel but is NOT serialized with the T_ prefix — it's persisted in wxConfig as xLightsResetBlendingPanel. The JSON-built panel adds it as a subclass custom, not a framework-built control.

LayerMethod and EffectLayerMix are *also* surfaced in the Buffer panel and serialized as B_CHOICE_LayerMethod / B_SLIDER_EffectLayerMix. When both T_ and B_ copies exist on the same effect, the T_ copy is the authoritative value.

In_Transition_Adjust and Reverse are enabled only when Fadein > 0 AND the transition type supports adjustment/reverse; this compound condition is implemented in BlendingPanel::ValidateWindow (it can't be expressed with the current JSON visibilityRules schema).

Canvas mode requires a separate LayerSelectDialog invoked from the 'Layers ...' button; the selected source layers are persisted as T_LayersSelected by the subclass, not in the framework properties_ map.
Fade in/out times are specified in seconds in the UI but stored as string and converted to integer step counts at render time using the sequence's frameTimeInMs.
